evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Develop, test, and maintain dimensional data models; fast-paced startup environment
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Mixed: rigour signals (testing, dimensional modeling, documentation) balanced with fast-paced startup framing.
evidence.domain_risk: Fresha is an international payments/logistics platform; moderate domain risk for e-commerce.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Moderate: SaaS/payments platform affects business decisions but lacks explicit regulatory/financial reporting language.
evidence.collaboration_width: Product Managers; Engineers; Analysts; Commercial Leadership
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Tools in responsibilities (dbt, dimensional modeling, data products) and multiple analyst roles imply growing function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Develop, test, and maintain dimensional data models from diverse sources including CDC data, APIs, and SFTPs
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Hiring manager: named sources (CDC, APIs, SFTPs) and dimensional modeling methodology show technical precision.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Product Managers; Commercial Leadership; internal and external data products
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Mixed: product (advising on feature requirements) and commercial (commercial/finance teams) equally weighted.
evidence.autonomy_level: Proactive, autonomous problem-solving approach; Advise product teams
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Mixed: autonomy in technical problem-solving plus some strategic input to product teams on requirements.
evidence.ai_role: Experience using AI development tools in workflows; Claude Code and MCP experience
evidence.ai_role_explanation: AI user: candidate expected to use AI development tools and specifically Claude Code to accelerate their own work.
evidence.testing_framing: Develop, test, and maintain dimensional data models; build and maintain high-quality internal and external data products
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Responsibility: testing is framed as owned practice in the role's core responsibilities.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: high-quality internal and external data products; ensuring clean and accurate information
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate loss aversion: reliability is a concern (high-quality data products) but secondary to building capability.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Enhance data model efficiency and performance
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Fix/scale: task is to improve and scale existing data models, not build greenfield.
evidence.loss_aversion: Build and maintain high-quality internal and external data products; ensuring clean and accurate information for decision-making — preventing bad data but not driven by regulatory fear.
